params.name: action
params.description: The action which should be performed by the server

params.name: dvrConverterDefaultFileDestination
params.description: The file location to use when converting a nDVR store, the default is configured as the StorageDir in the application in use

params.name: dvrConverterDebugConversions
params.description: Indicates if the conversion should have debugging enabled, can be true or false, default is false

params.name: dvrConverterContinueOnSourceErrors
params.description: Indicates if the conversion should continue even if errors are detected, can be true or false, default is true

params.name: dvrConverterAudioVideoSyncEnable
params.description: Indicates if the audio/video offset should be detected and conversion only started after the sync in no longer detected or over default allowable time. Can be true or false, default is false

params.name: dvrConverterAudioVideoMaxOffset
params.description: Indicates the maximum audio/video timecodes can be out of sync

params.name: dvrConverterAudioVideoMaxBuffer
params.description: Indicates the maximum time a correct audio/video sync will be searched for before giving up

params.name: dvrConverterStartTime
params.description: A start time in UTC from where the conversion should start in the store, default is the first entry in the store

params.name: dvrConverterEndTime
params.description: A end time in UTC  where the conversion should end in the store, default is to the end of the store

params.name: dvrConverterDuration
params.description: A duration for the conversion either added to the start or subtracted from the end time, if you use duration you can not use start and end

params.name: dvrConverterOutputFilename
params.description: Indicates the output filename if not using the default, which is the name of the store being converted

params.name: dvrConverterStoreList
params.description: The comma-separated list of stores to convert

params.name: vhostName
params.description: The name of the current VHost the action will be performed on

params.description: The application name needed for this REST call

params.description: The byte offset in the file at which to begin getting log lines

params.name: filter
params.description: A string containing a list of predefined search filters separated by | where valid strings are noDebug,noInfo,noWarn,noError,noHeader,noColumnHeadings

params.name: search
params.description: A string containing a literal string on which to filter or a regex

params.name: regexSearch
params.description: Indicates if the 'search' parameter is a regex or a literal string

params.name: head
params.description: Returns the first x lines from the requested log file, the overrides the startoffset and linecount values

params.name: tail
params.description: Returns the last x lines from the requested log file, the overrides the startoffset and linecount values
